# cdp_df_added_readyflow (Resource)

Adds a ReadyFlow to the current CDP account's DataFlow catalog.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `readyflow_crn` (String) The CRN of the ReadyFlow to add.

### Read-Only

- `added_readyflow_crn` (String) The CRN of the added ReadyFlow in the account.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
